name: Ethereum Swarm Storage Agent
description: Decentralized storage agent powered by Ethereum Swarm. Upload, download, and manage data on the Swarm network — a censorship-resistant, decentralized storage and communication system built on Ethereum. Supports raw data, files, folders, mutable feeds, and postage stamp lifecycle management via the swarm-mcp toolset.

skills.name: Upload Data
skills.description: Upload text data to Swarm. Returns an immutable content-addressed reference hash. Optional: redundancyLevel (0-4) for fault tolerance, postageBatchId to specify a pre-purchased stamp.
examples: Store this text on Swarm
Upload data to decentralized storage

skills.name: Download Data
skills.description: Download immutable data from Swarm using a content-addressed reference hash. Returns the original text data stored at that address.
examples: Retrieve data from Swarm by reference hash
Download content from decentralized storage

skills.name: Upload File
skills.description: Upload a file to Swarm from base64-encoded content or a local file path. Optional: redundancyLevel (0-4) for fault tolerance, postageBatchId. Returns a Swarm reference hash.
examples: Upload this file to Swarm
Store a file on decentralized storage

skills.name: Upload Folder
skills.description: Upload an entire folder to Swarm. Requires a local folder path. Optional: redundancyLevel (0-4), postageBatchId. Returns a Swarm reference hash for the folder manifest.
examples: Upload this directory to Swarm
Store a folder on decentralized storage

skills.name: Download Files
skills.description: Download files or folders from Swarm using a reference hash. Prioritized over download-data for unknown data types. Optional: filePath for local destination.
examples: Download files from this Swarm reference
Retrieve a folder from decentralized storage

skills.name: Update Feed
skills.description: Update a mutable Swarm feed with new data for a given topic. Feeds provide mutable pointers to immutable content, enabling updatable resources on Swarm. Requires data and memoryTopic. Optional: postageBatchId.
examples: Update my Swarm feed with new content
Write to a mutable feed topic

skills.name: Read Feed
skills.description: Retrieve the latest data from a Swarm feed by topic. Optionally specify an owner Ethereum address to read another account's feed.
examples: Read the latest data from my Swarm feed
Get the current value of a feed topic

skills.name: Create Postage Stamp
skills.description: Buy a postage stamp (storage voucher) based on required storage size in MB and duration (e.g. '1d', '1w', '1month'). Postage stamps are required to upload data to Swarm. Optional: label for human-readable identification.
examples: Buy a postage stamp for 100 MB lasting 1 month
Create a storage voucher for Swarm uploads

skills.name: Get Postage Stamp
skills.description: Retrieve details of a specific postage stamp by its batch ID, including remaining capacity and expiry information.
examples: Check the status of my postage stamp
Get details for this batch ID

skills.name: List Postage Stamps
skills.description: List available postage stamps with optional filtering. Options: leastUsed (sort order), limit (max results), minUsage/maxUsage (percentage filters).
examples: Show my available postage stamps
List stamps with less than 50% usage

skills.name: Extend Postage Stamp
skills.description: Increase the duration or storage capacity of an existing postage stamp by batch ID. Specify additional size in MB and/or additional duration.
examples: Extend my postage stamp by 1 week
Add 50 MB to this batch

skills.name: Query Upload Progress
skills.description: Check the upload progress of a deferred upload using a tag ID returned by upload_file or upload_folder operations. Used for monitoring large uploads that exceed the 5 MB sync threshold.
examples: Check the progress of my upload
Query upload status by tag ID
